note: Created tests/config_fixtures.rs with: test key generators, valid single/multi-peer configs, config with all optional fields (PresharedKey, PersistentKeepalive, DNS, ListenPort), IPv6 config, comments/whitespace config, and malformed config generators (bad base64, wrong key length, bad CIDR, missing prefix, bad endpoints, missing fields, unrecognized keys, unclosed headers, empty config). Compiles cleanly.
